data.name: 女僕人妻放題咖啡廳
data.detailed_description:
美女妻子們任你享用，盡情配種！
■被任何人討厭的醜男阿宅用金錢的力量一個一個吃下美女人妻！用你的精子讓清純淑女人妻，好勝的傲嬌人妻，穩重而又知性的眼鏡美女人妻，性感模特兒人妻等等最棒的女人們懷孕吧！


用咖啡店猥瑣的製服滿足你的慾望！

■直接喝母乳，真空咖啡店制服，用小穴給你投食，同吃一根百奇的舌吻，雙人口交侍奉，5p連續射精等，人妻咖啡店裡全是被連續色情的服務而成為雞雞俘虜的美女妻子！ [/i]

■在老公面前給他們展示和被NTR的美女人妻們的做愛！
CUUUUUUM！ Hard-on desu YOO~”

■盡情享受別人老婆的小穴並互相對比！代替沒用的老公告訴她們大雞雞的滋味吧！讓妻子們射入大量精液讓她們懷孕後，讓懷孕的女人們給你做淫亂的服務，並在她們老公面前做出NTR宣言！


所以親愛的顧客，快來這家女僕咖啡廳嚐嚐每日特色菜：NTR à la Maid~
[列表]
  • 日本原始視覺小說的翻譯版本
  • 4位乳白色女僕全部配音，原汁原味的日文對白
  • 原始藝術作品高清升級，具有 16:9 和 4:3 變體
  • 故事內容的時數
  • 音頻，包括音樂和特效
  • 透過角色精靈動畫進行增強
  • 圖庫與場景選擇
  • 在無助的丈夫面前盡情狂歡，在他們眼前操他們的妻子！

女僕人妻放題咖啡廳：擠奶女僕是由多產的日本開發商 Miel 最初創作的視覺小說的英文在地化版本。 Cherry Kiss 的目標是為日本以外的遊戲玩家提供正宗的日本視覺小說體驗。

**請注意**
本遊戲中所描述和視覺呈現的所有角色均已年滿 18 歲，並且在本遊戲的製作過程中未使用實際或可識別的未成年人。

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.11
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

data.name: Cuckies & Cream: Maids for Milking
data.detailed_description:
Screw your husbands, I have MONEY! Four desperate wives have no choice but to become your personal milk maids if they want to pay off their useless husband's debts. Once you've paid off the waitresses it's time to upgrade the menu to offer some special items for cultured connoisseurs: a veritable all-you-can-fuck buffet of MILFs, Maids, Models and more!



Come in to quench your thirst with two giant jugs of Ayano's own mommy milk.



If that doesn't hit the spot try tossing a healthy salad with the innocent glasses-wearing Yuri- she'll really appreciate if you can provide her with some of your special sauce.



Chisato is a former model who will provide you with excellent eye candy as she performs the shop's special charm to make sure the food is delicious and the sex is hot and sweaty. Say it with me if you know it, "Moe Moe CUUUUUUM! Hard-on desu YOO~ "



Make sure you leave some room for desert as we have aphrodisiac laced chocolate fed to you mouth-to-mouth style by a tsundere tomboy to finish off this four course meal!

So please, dear customer, cum on down to this Maid Café and try the daily special: NTR à la Maid~

Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel

All four milky maids are fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue

Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants

Hours of story content

Audio including music and special effects

Enhanced with character sprite animations

Gallery and Scene selections

A full on orgy in front of the helpless husbands as you fuck their wives before their eyes!

Cuckies & Cream: Maids for Milking Is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

**PLEASE NOTE**

All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: Madam, if you have no money won't you sell your body? That's where you and your huge... "wallet" come in! At first they're doing it to pay off their husband's debts, but once these four married maids are hooked on your donations they'll be calling you Master in no time~
